items.line_en: Hey kids, have you ever heard of recycling?

coach.say: Hey kids, have you ever heard of recycling?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey kids, / have you ever heard of recycling?

items.line_en: Today, we're going to learn why it's important to recycle and how we can all do our part to help the environment.

coach.say: Today, we're going to learn why it's important to recycle and how we can all do our part to help the environment.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Today, / we're going to learn why it's important to recycle and how we can all do our part to help the environment.

items.line_en: When we throw things away in the trash, they usually end up in a landfill.

coach.say: When we throw things away in the trash, they usually end up in a landfill.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When we throw things away in the trash, / they usually end up in a landfill.

items.line_en: Landfills are big areas where our waste is buried in the ground.

coach.say: Landfills are big areas where our waste is buried in the ground.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Landfills are big areas where our waste is buried in the ground.

items.line_en: This can be harmful to the environment because some waste takes a long time to break down.

coach.say: This can be harmful to the environment because some waste takes a long time to break down.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This can be harmful to the environment because / some waste takes a long time to break down.

items.line_en: To recycle, we need to sort our waste into different recycling bins.

coach.say: To recycle, we need to sort our waste into different recycling bins.
coach.hint: Chunk it: To recycle, / we need to sort our waste into different recycling bins.

items.line_en: This helps reduce the amount of waste in landfills and saves natural resources.

coach.say: This helps reduce the amount of waste in landfills and saves natural resources.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This helps reduce the amount of waste in landfills and / saves natural resources.

items.line_en: Plastic goes in one bin, paper in another, and glass in a third.

coach.say: Plastic goes in one bin, paper in another, and glass in a third.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Plastic goes in one bin, / paper in another, / and glass in a third.

items.line_en: Recycling is when we take old materials and turn them into new things.

coach.say: Recycling is when we take old materials and turn them into new things.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Recycling is when we take old materials and / turn them into new things.
Chunk it: Recycling has many benefits.

items.line_en: It makes our ecosystem healthy, reduces emissions, saves energy, creates jobs, and saves money.

coach.say: It makes our ecosystem healthy, reduces emissions, saves energy, creates jobs, and saves money.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It makes our ecosystem healthy, reduces emissions, / saves energy, creates jobs, and saves money.

items.line_en: Remember, even small actions, like recycling, can make a big difference for our planet.

coach.say: Remember, even small actions, like recycling, can make a big difference for our planet.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Remember, / even small actions, / like recycling, / can make a big difference for our planet.

items.line_en: So, let's all do our part and recycle.

coach.say: So, let's all do our part and recycle.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So, / let's all do our part and recycle.
